The Bachelor of Science in Electrical Engineering (BSEE) is an undergraduate program designed to provide students with a strong foundation in the principles of electrical engineering and related fields. The program combines theoretical knowledge with practical skills, preparing graduates to tackle complex engineering challenges across a variety of industries, such as energy, telecommunications, electronics, automation, and renewable energy systems.
